clean_headline: Board approved appointment of Mr. Prabhat Modi as Additional Director (Non-Executive Non-Independent) for five years and Ms. Kirti Vishnu Tiwari as Chief Financial Officer
raw_headline:
The Exchange has sought clarification from Confidence Petroleum India Ltd on March 13, 2026, with reference to Movement in Volume.

The reply is awaited.

clean_headline: Polycab India Limited intimated schedule of institutional analyst and investor meetings
